title: Defining a short backup retention duration is security-sensitive
description: Defining a short backup retention duration is security-sensitiveAnalyze your codeintentionality-completesecuritySecurity HotspotawsReducing the backup retention duration can reduce an organization’s ability to re-establish service in case of a security incident.Data backups allow to overcome corruption or unavailability of data by recovering as efficiently as possible from a security incident.Backup retention duration, coverage, and backup locations are essential criteria regarding functional continuity.Ask Yourself WhetherThis component is essential for the information system infrastructure.This component is essential for mission-critical functions.Compliance policies require this component to be backed up for a specific amount of time.There is a risk if you answered yes to any of those q
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Resources:
  ProductionDatabase:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: prod-db
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.medium
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 1  # Non-compliant: too short, allows no recovery in case of incident
      AllocatedStorage: 100
compliant:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Resources:
  ProductionDatabase:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: prod-db
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.medium
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 30  # Compliant: sufficient retention for recovery
      AllocatedStorage: 100

property_checks.message: Backup retention period is too short for security incident recovery
Snapshot retention limit is too short for security incident recovery
Automated snapshot retention period is too short for security incident recovery
